title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Licence is proposed to be offered for unsettled retail vend of Mohanpur Bazar Foreign Liquor Shop No.1,Mohanpur under West Tripura District for the financial year 2019-2020. | 25/10/2019 | 25/11/2019 | |

| Notice Inviting Tender (NIT) floated for settlement of Foreign Liquor and Country Liquor shops under West Tripura District. | Settlement of Foreign Liquor and Country Liquor shops. | 26/06/2019 | 26/07/2019 | |
